sourceMovie.title: Hitman: Agent Jun
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Hitman: Agent Jun (2020) as a action theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The action and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Spies in Disguise
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Hitman: Agent Jun clicked for you, Spies in Disguise (2019) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Hitman: Agent Jun?
faq.answer: Try Spies in Disguise, My Spy, Officer Black Belt—each shares DNA with Hitman: Agent Jun while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Hitman: Agent Jun?
faq.answer: Hitman: Agent Jun (2020) is best described as Action, Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Hitman: Agent Jun part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Hitman: Agent Jun Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
